field.name: team_id
field.label: Team
field.description: The team this match belongs to
field.query: SELECT t.id AS value, CONCAT('Team ', t.team_number, ' (', IF(s.label != '', CONCAT(s.label, ' '), ''), s.start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(s.start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0'), ')') AS text FROM #__ttclub_teams t LEFT JOIN #__ttclub_seasons s ON s.id = t.season_id WHERE t.published = 1 ORDER BY s.start_year DESC, s.label ASC, t.team_number ASC

field.name: season_id
field.label: Season
field.description: The season this match belongs to
field.query: SELECT id AS value, CONCAT(IF(label != '', CONCAT(label, ' '), ''), start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0')) AS text FROM #__ttclub_seasons WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY start_year DESC, label ASC

field.name: match_time
field.label: Match Time
field.description: The time of the match (HH:MM format)

field.name: opponent
field.label: Opponent
field.description: The name of the opposing team

field.name: home_away
field.label: Home / Away
field.description: Whether this is a home or away match

field.name: result
field.label: Result
field.description: The match result (e.g., 9:5). Can be added after the match is played.
